siteGate.title: Coming soon
siteGate.subtitle: This site is not public yet. Enter the access password to continue.

home.description: A community-first Git forge for self-hosting and collaboration.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to continue.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Join this instance to host and collaborate on Git repositories.

errors.slug.format: Username may only contain letters, numbers, and hyphens.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your username and email to receive a reset code.
forgotPassword.success: If the account exists, a reset email has been sent.
forgotPassword.error: Could not send reset email. Check your details and try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the reset code from your email and choose a new password.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.error: Could not reset password. The code may be invalid or expired.

verification.failed: Verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.
verification.bannerDescription: Please verify your email address to create repositories.

debug.label: Debug
debug.settingsDescription: Development-only shortcuts. Email is not sent when showing a code.
debug.codeError: Could not generate a verification code.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and SSH keys.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.error: Could not change password. Check your current password.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.warning: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Enter your password to permanently delete your account.

sshKeys.title: SSH keys
sshKeys.subtitle: Manage SSH public keys used for Git authentication.
sshKeys.disabledHint: This instance uses HTTPS and personal access tokens for Git. Contact your operator to enable SSH.

accessTokens.title: Personal access tokens
accessTokens.subtitle: Create tokens for Git over HTTPS (use the token as your Git password).
accessTokens.createdTokenHint: You won't be able to see this token again. Use it as the password when Git prompts for credentials over HTTPS.

dashboard.title: Welcome, {username}
dashboard.subtitle: Your repositories and organizations at a glance.
dashboard.noRepositories: You haven't created any repositories yet.

create.title: New organization
create.subtitle: Create an organization to collaborate with others.

members.title: Members
members.forbidden: You do not have access to view this organization's members.

invite.title: Organization invitation
invite.signInRequired: Sign in or create an account to respond to this invitation.

create.title: New repository
create.subtitle: Create a new Git repository.
create.orgRequired: Select an organization to create a repository under.
create.emailRequired: Verify your email before creating repositories.

overview.title: Repository
overview.httpsHint: Use a personal access token as your Git password. Create one in
overview.cloneHttpsStep2: Run this command in your terminal (replace YOUR_TOKEN with your token):
overview.cloneHttpsPromptHint: Alternatively, clone using the URL above without credentials. When Git prompts you, use username {username} and your token as the password.
overview.pushSectionIntro: Already have a Git project on your machine? Connect it to this remote and upload your commits.
overview.pushHttpsStep1AfterLink: with write scope so you can push.
overview.pushHttpsStep2: In your local repository directory, run (replace YOUR_TOKEN and path/to/your-repo):
overview.pushSshStep2: In your local repository directory, run (replace path/to/your-repo):
overview.branchHint: Replace main with your default branch name if it differs. If origin already exists, use git remote set-url origin … instead of git remote add.

settings.title: Repository settings
settings.deleteWarning: Deleting a repository is permanent and cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete the repository and all its data.

mergeRequests.title: Merge requests
mergeRequests.branchesDescription: Manage default branch, protected branch rules, and push policies.
mergeRequests.positiveFileSize: Max file size must be positive.
mergeRequests.patternHelper: Use @default to protect the repository default branch.
mergeRequests.forcePushAllowList: Allow force push for allowlisted pushers
mergeRequests.bannerDescription: {branch} is {count} commit(s) ahead of the default branch.

storage.title: Storage usage
storage.unavailable: Storage usage data is not available.
storage.warningDescription: This repository is using over 80% of its quota. Consider cleaning up or self-hosting.
storage.limitDescription: This repository has reached its storage limit. Self-host OpenGitBase for unlimited storage.

discussions.heading: Discussions
discussions.title: Discussions
discussions.empty: No discussions yet. Start the first conversation.
discussions.signInToView: Sign in to view discussions on this repository.
discussions.signInToComment: Sign in to join the conversation.
discussions.creator: Creator
discussions.pickLineHint: Click a line to discuss it
discussions.pickExtendHint: Click another line to extend the range
discussions.pickEndLine: Click end line (or same line again for a single line)
discussions.pickEndLineUndo: Click end line, or the same line again for a single line
discussions.lineRangeReselect: Lines {range} selected — click any line to start over
discussions.lineRangeDiscussActions: Lines {range} selected — use the actions above to start a discussion
discussions.blobLinePickHint: Start a new discussion or add a comment to an existing one.
discussions.linePickComplete: Lines selected — choose what to do next

settings.title: Discussion settings
settings.forbidden: Only repository admins can manage blocked users.
settings.blockDescription: Blocked users can still read discussions but cannot create or comment.
settings.linkDescription: Block users from creating discussions or commenting.

browse.syncing: Syncing… content may be slightly behind the primary.
browse.emptyDescription: Push commits to this repository to browse files here.
browse.forbidden: You do not have access to browse this repository's contents.
browse.unavailable: Repository content is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
browse.pathNotFound: This path does not exist at the selected ref.
browse.fileNotFound: This file does not exist at the selected ref.
browse.tooLarge: This file is too large to display inline. Download it instead.
browse.svgDownloadOnly: SVG files cannot be previewed inline. Download the file instead.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Discover public repositories on this instance.

storage.title: Storage fleet
storage.description: View storage nodes, create enrollments, and manage dispatcher SSH keys.

replication.title: Repository replication
replication.description: Audit RF=3 health, backfill progress, and watermark lag across repositories.
replication.indexDescription: Paginated fleet view of replication state, quorum, and sync progress.
